case_title: ROSELA S. JOHNSON VS. MOSES ROSS

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 11/30/22. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO MOSES ROSS-UNCLAIMED/UNABLE TO FORWARD

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ROSELA S. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY JOHNSON, ROSELA S. ROSS, MOSES
